programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: Frasier: Halloween
programme.desc: Niles hosts a costume party and Roz tells Frasier that she may be expecting a child.

programme.title: Frasier: The Kid
programme.desc: Roz comes to terms with her impending motherhood and at Frasier's urging, decides to tell the news to the baby's father.

programme.title: Frasier: The 1000th Show
programme.desc: The station manager wants to throw a publicity rally to celebrate Frasier's 1000th show. This soon escalates into 'Frasier Crane Day,' leaving Niles very jealous. There is just one problem: Frasier can't seem to get there in time.

programme.title: Frasier: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: Roz gets an offer for a free cruise if Frasier agrees to make a celebrity appearance.

programme.title: Frasier: My Fair Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier has a relationship with a well-known attorney. All is well until his family point out that Frasier is playing out the role of the submissive female in the relationship.

programme.title: Frasier: Desperately Seeking Closure
programme.desc: Samantha dumps Frasier, who then becomes obsessed with finding out why she suddenly chose to end their relationship.

programme.title: Frasier: Perspectives on Christmas
programme.desc: Martin, Daphne, Niles and Roz recount their stories of a stressful Christmas period, including Martin being in a Christmas pageant, Daphne thinking Martin is dying and Frasier telling Roz's mother she is pregnant.

programme.title: Frasier: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: Frasier is bored with his regular routine so Daphne invites him to her British pub. Daphne quickly feels he is invading her turf and so a darts match is arranged to decide who gets to keep visiting the pub.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's Old Girlfriend
programme.desc: A fictitious old flame of Ricky's provides a nightmare for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Million-Dollar Idea
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel have visions of making a million dollars selling salad dressing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Minds the Baby
programme.desc: Ricky is supposed to be baby-sitting Little Ricky but somehow he's not.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Charm School
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enrol in charm school to cope with their husband's interest in a woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding at Graceland
programme.desc: A busy couple decide to get married in Graceland in June, but, she's fresh from a tour and has a new album due. The couple take on the challenge, and throw together the best, quickie wedding, they can manage.

programme.title: Movie: Love in the Forecast
programme.desc: An aspiring meteorologist finds love with her next-door neighbour.

programme.title: Movie: Love by Chance
programme.desc: A woman's mother is obsessed with her lack of love life and secretly sets her up with who she sees as the perfect man, but she just wants to run her restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: Rescuing Madison
programme.desc: A romance begins when a famous singer is rescued by a firefighter.

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons
programme.desc: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: The Closer: In Custody
programme.desc: While investigating a suspicious suicide, the squad wades into a nasty child-custody dispute between a dying man and his meth-addicted ex-wife. Meanwhile, Pope applies for the police chief job.

programme.title: The Closer: Layover
programme.desc: Provenza once again finds himself in a professionally embarrassing situation when he discovers a dead body in the condo of a flight attendant he picked up while extraditing a prisoner. Brenda reveals her career intentions for Pope.

programme.title: The Closer: Heart Attack
programme.desc: Detective Ramsky has the squad investigate a series of brutal murders that may mean a Mexican drug cartel has arrived in the city.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Mummified remains of a woman put the team's investigative skills to the test. Jane works from her hospital room as she, with Maura's and her family's support, seeks to recover from a devastating loss.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Phoenix Rising
programme.desc: The team helps Korsak investigate an old case that has gone very, very cold. Jane refuses to believe that she's not ready to go back on duty and takes some untraditional steps to stay involved.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: You Can't Stand the Heat
programme.desc: In the middle of a heatwave, Jane and Maura find a man who died suspiciously in a bathtub full of ice. In trying to stay cool, Angela discovers a spicy tea that seems to be working but has unexpected romantic consequences.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Slater/ Williams
programme.desc: A dance-obsessed housewife who maps out every minute of her day and pushes her kids in ballroom dancing competitions swaps with a mother of three who lets her kids eat whatever and whenever and runs her house like the wild, wild West.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Meeks/ Hoover
programme.desc: An ultra conservative mom who believes that a woman's place is in the home swaps lives with a mom who refuses to give up her dream of being a rock star.

programme.title: Wife Swap: McDonald/ Robarge
programme.desc: A feminine burlesque dancer swaps lives with a lumberjack who loves chainsaws and the outdoors and is "just one of the guys".

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Lady in the Barrel
programme.desc: In 1999, a murdered woman and her address book are discovered to have been soaked in a barrel for over 30 years. Detectives must use spectral imaging to recover information for a break in the case.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Left For Dead
programme.desc: Armed with DNA and a license plate from a particularly violent rape case, a detective thinks he has an easy case to crack. But neither provides a match. The case goes cold until the ground-breaking ‘Combined DNA Index System’ finds a hit years later.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: Newlyweds are murdered in a small town in Illinois and a local barfly is quickly sent to death row for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of the Nazca
programme.desc: Josh flies to Peru to investigate the giant geoglyphs drawn into earth by ancient Nazca tribes. By studying newly found lines and joining a Nazca psychedelic ritual, Josh uncovers the true meaning behind the mysterious tracings.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases of all-time: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Dead Mountain Mission
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the treacherous conditions of Dead Mountain as he concludes his Dyatlov Pass investigation. As the crew re-traces the ill-fated hikers' last steps, a big discovery looms that could crack the mysterious case.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: Stayin' Alive
programme.desc: Come with Josh if you want to live as he tackles the world of survival. Josh's guests include Scream's David Arquette who talks about his near-death experience, actor Josh Lucas of Alive and the stars of Discovery's new off-grid series, 100 Days Wild.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: The Hits Keep Coming
programme.desc: A dockhand hopes his sea legs will keep him steady. A deputy sheriff lays down the law.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: A Mission from God
programme.desc: Jim and Chris are on their way to Idaho for a Blues Brothers show with Dan Aykroyd, where Jim plans to ask Dan for the right to use the Blues Brothers' brand. Dan sets Jim on a 'Mission from God' to Colombia, in pursuit of elusive cannabis strains.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Welcome to Thunderdome
programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life compete for glory and $25,000 cash in an arena unlike any other. A dodgeball deity tests his mettle. A fitness model shows she can do more than just look the part. 'Aaron Rodgers' tries his hand at a brand-new ballgame.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Left Behind
programme.desc: Four weeks into the brutal 40-day Amazon challenge, a violent two-day storm descends on the jungle. Before it's over, one more survivalist will be gone, leaving another hanging by a tenuous thread.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: The Final Fight
programme.desc: After Russell's shocking decision to quit the Amazon challenge, the remaining survivalists struggle to regroup in time for a brutal two-day 15-mile water extraction journey. Electric eels, anaconda and caiman all pose threats in this jam-packed finale.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mystery in Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot investigate a strange phenomenon that's been haunting Mammoth Cave for generations.

programme.title: Expedition X: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica head to Lake Lanier, the deadliest lake in America, to uncover rumors of drownings and ghostly encounters.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country
programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Angie J's Story

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa's Story
programme.desc: Jennifer and her daughter Marissa are stuck in a codependent relationship that has put both of their lives in jeopardy, with a combined weight of over 900-lbs. See if Jennifer can regain control and save both their lives before it's too late.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Liz's Story
programme.desc: Liz is completely bed bound with severe lymphedema that makes it impossible to walk. Utterly isolated, with no friends, she battles depression, and lives with her mom who is too ill to take care of her. Liz desperately wants to become mobile.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa and Liz
programme.desc: Liz has gone from being bedbound with lymphedemas on both legs, to standing and walking, but old fears are about to threaten her progress. If Jenn and Marissa can't get along as mother and daughter to lose weight, they'll have to proceed apart.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Liz's Story
programme.desc: Liz is completely bed bound with severe lymphedema that makes it impossible to walk. Utterly isolated, with no friends, she battles depression, and lives with her mom who is too ill to take care of her. Liz desperately wants to become mobile.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa and Liz
programme.desc: Liz has gone from being bedbound with lymphedemas on both legs, to standing and walking, but old fears are about to threaten her progress. If Jenn and Marissa can't get along as mother and daughter to lose weight, they'll have to proceed apart.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Summer Lovin'

programme.desc: The Johnstons pamper themselves with mud masks before getting down and dirty at a princess themed mud run. Jonah gives Trent and Amber some devastating news and Trent receives the results from his gallbladder scan.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen who are breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a jet ski collision leads to arguments, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Boaters, Floaters and the Wildlife
programme.desc: Wardens prepare to patrol for violations on the San Marcos River, and an intoxicated man is found roaming a small island on Lake Texoma. Then, a bobcat makes a residential garage its home, while investigations begin for multiple illegal deer kills.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Texas game wardens protect the natural resources of their vast state while fighting crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trouble on Mount Chocorua
programme.desc: Officer Canfield disrupts a popular but illegal fishing tournament, while Officer McFadzen comes to the aid of an injured hawk. Then, a rescue mission is deployed on Mount Chocorua to save a wounded woman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: When record storms hit Texas, search and rescue teams are determined to save stranded citizens from disastrous weather conditions. Warden Eddins helps a neighbor in need, and Warden Startz patrols the Gudalupe river.

programme.title: North Woods Law: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The entire warden service pulls together for a massive search effort for a missing boy. A second search for a lost hiker stretches the wardens to their limit. A pair of salmon poachers are caught in the act and a new K-9 is trained.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Night and Day
programme.desc: The wardens work around the clock to handle turkey hunting season and smelt runs. A search warrant is needed upon the discovery of poached turkeys. The wardens come across many animals including orphaned baby foxes, nuisance beavers and a python.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poaching Rampage
programme.desc: Game Wardens investigate an illegal deer hunting case that becomes the largest deer poaching case in Texas history.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Superfly Parrot Palace
programme.desc: With their home doubling as a rescue for dozens of parrots, the Brewer family needs Antonio's help. Antonio helps the family reclaim their kitchen and dining room, and builds a huge geodesic dome to give these colorful birds space to spread their wings.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Football Pup Palace
programme.desc: Turf, the 'wildlife control officer' for the Seahawks, is a working dog with messy habits. Antonio helps his owners turn their laundry room into a fully operational doggy spa and transforms the lackluster backyard into a football-themed doggy paradise.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Fluffy Fixer Pupper
programme.desc: A family needs help creating a multi-functional space for the bunnies, ferrets, cats and dogs that have taken over their home. Antonio designs elaborate hatches, ramps and tunnels allowing the animals to be in the same room, but remain safely separated.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Cat Build Gone Wild
programme.desc: A couple wants their Savannah cat and foster kittens to safely enjoy the outdoors. Antonio's solution is an intricate system of outdoor catwalks and double-decker enclosures with cat-friendly plants, natural climbing surfaces and all the toys a cat needs.

programme.title: Tanked!: Mel's Drive In Tank
programme.desc: California restaurant Mel's Drive In wants a tank for their new location in Santa Monica. The owners want a nostalgic feel and a ton of insert pieces that represent Mel's storied history, while pointing to the restaurant's future.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Miami Heat is On!
programme.desc: Seven-foot-tall NBA star Hassan Whiteside knows a thing or two about what it means to be big. He tasks Wayde and Brett with building him a tank so big it won't fit through the front door and has to be delivered to his Miami pad on a barge.

programme.title: Tanked!: Country Superstar Surprise!
programme.desc: Brittany Kerr, wife of country superstar Jason Aldean, wants Wayde and Brett to surprise her husband with a fish tank. The great outdoors themed tank has to be a total secret and built before Jason returns from his tour.

programme.title: Tanked!: Party Rockin' Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for world famous artist and DJ Redfoo of the band LMFAO. The guys attempt their very first one-of-a-kind DJ booth aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fernando Vargas's Knockout Tank
programme.desc: Three-time world champion boxer Fernando Vargas asks Wayde and Brett to make a boxing-glove shaped tank for his boxing gym in Las Vegas. But this challenge goes well beyond the ring.

programme.title: Tanked!: Brett's Donut Mania Tank
programme.desc: Donut Mania is Brett's newest business venture and they are about to have their grand opening. Wayde and the whole team want to congratulate him with a surprise fish tank.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The deck is plagued with accidents, and winter season rocks the fleet with swells of 20 feet and winds of 40 knots. The Bering Sea takes a brutal toll on Cornelia Marie, and strategy is critical with crabs on the move in the wheelhouse.

programme.title: Movie: ATL
programme.desc: Friends face different challenges as they prepare for life after high school.

programme.title: Movie: Stomp the Yard

programme.title: Property Brothers: Charming Fixer-upper With Unexpected Issues

programme.title: Property Brothers: Dream City, Dream Job, Dream Home
programme.desc: After years of living out of a suitcase, it's time for globetrotting Aussies Levi and Alysha to put down roots. And since they've already landed dream jobs in their dream city, the only thing left on their list is a dream home.

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: Honey, We're Home!
programme.desc: The Brady Bunch kids have an emotional reunion in Studio City, CA, home before beginning demolition. The Property Brothers work to transport the front exterior back to 1969. Then, they renovate the heart of the home, including the iconic staircase.

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: Here's the Second Story
programme.desc: The teams wind back the clock to day one and take on four more iconic rooms, including Mike Brady's den, the kids' bedrooms and the Jack and Jill bathroom.

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: Orange You Glad It's Avocado?
programme.desc: Some of the most famous areas of the Brady house are featured with Steve and Leanne Ford teaming up with Christopher Knight and Eve Plumb to build out the kitchen and family room on the first floor. The backyard is completed and Alice's bedroom furnished.

programme.title: A Very Brady Renovation: A Sunshine Day on Clinton Way
programme.desc: Barry Williams joins Lara Spencer and Jasmine Roth to recreate his attic bedroom, but in a very unexpected part of the house. Also, Jasmine pulls double duty working on Mike and Carol Brady's master bedroom with Mike Lookinland.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Deceiving Deal
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina see a great opportunity to purchase a three-bedroom house in Whittier, California, for a low price since the seller is looking to unload it quickly and it is still tenant-occupied.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Lessons in Laguna Beach
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in an upscale neighbourhood in Laguna Beach. Even though the house is small, it has an ocean view, which means big money. However, having never flipped in the area, they aren't sure what to offer for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Maze
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina check out a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in their new stomping grounds of Garden Grove, California. Hoping to snatch this property before it hits the market, they arrive to find the house is dirty with a mosquito-infested pool.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: When strange additions and design challenges collide, this quick flip turns out to be harder than anticipated.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: False Start Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about a home in El Monte, California, but they can't look at the inside before making an offer. After checking the exterior, they make an offer and get it for a good price, but think twice after they get inside the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Home Town: Fire and Water
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a house where they can entertain friends in a walkable neighborhood. Ben and Erin give their pick a complete facelift by adding a coastal color scheme, built-in banquet and a back patio that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Home Is Where the Art Is

programme.title: Home Town: Home Away From Home
programme.desc: A couple wants a vacation home that's big enough to entertain but manageable to maintain. After showing them a 1920s cottage and a 1912 Craftsman, Ben and Erin create the perfect getaway for them with a large chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: Can This House Be Saved?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: On an Island
programme.desc: Bethenny and Dorinda hit the ground in Puerto Rico and get to work. Ramona attempts to mend fences with Sonja. Carole works on a revealing story with a magazine, while Luann starts to plan a special performance. Carole confronts Bethenny.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: A Frittered Friendship
programme.desc: Carole confides in Dorinda and Ramona about tension with Bethenny, which puts Dorinda in an uncomfortable place. Later, the ladies get decked out for a 1920's murder mystery dinner party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Holidazed and Confused
programme.desc: Carole and Bethenny continue to hash out their issues during the murder mystery dinner party. Back in the city, Bethenny's holiday party is interrupted by a surprise, which leads to hurt feelings.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: You Broke the Penal Code
programme.desc: Two weeks after Luann's surprising arrest, she is still the talk of the town. While she's in rehab in Palm Beach, the ladies try to piece together what happened. Bethenny throws a launch party for her new jeans line.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Faux Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Tinsley tries on wedding dresses with her mother, Dale. While Luann is ending her stint in rehab, the women tough it out during a prison style workout.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Every Mayflower Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Luann is out of rehab and the ladies whisk her away for a spa weekend in Connecticut. The relaxation doesn't last long as Luann discovers that Ramona tried to get an invite to Tom's New Year's Eve party. Dorinda and Sonja clash over a family crest.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Arrest and Relaxation
programme.desc: As the ladies try to relax into their trip to the spa, Luann finds herself dealing with unwanted press, while Dorinda confronts Bethenny about lingering tension. Dinner gets heated when Bethenny puts Tinsley on the spot over wedding dress shopping.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Dating Wishes and Cabaret Dreams
programme.desc: With Luann's cabaret show just weeks away, Dorinda brings her to pick out dresses from one of her designer connections. Bethenny creates a dating profile for Sonja, while Tinsley moves into her new penthouse, without Scott's help.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Wigging Out

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Guess Who's Arguing at Dinner?
programme.desc: As the ladies head out for a day of shopping in Cartegena, Bethenny continues to unravel, and the women's patience with her begins to run out. Carole approaches Sonja for insight on Bethenny and later, the two distant friends have a heated conversation.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Ship Happens
programme.desc: Tensions arise at breakfast as Luann and Dorinda continue their argument from the night before, as do Carole and Bethenny. Despite the strained relations, the ladies ditch the city for a private island and some fun in the sun.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Watching

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Threat
programme.desc: She was a divorced mother excited about her next chapter in life. Then, five gunshots shattered her plans. Proving who murdered Joan Lockwood was a daunting task for police. An ominous killer was still out there and her family was living in fear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death Trap

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Wasn't There

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: Angel's Landing was a community of free-spirits with Lou Castro at its center. Investigators were suspicious of the mysterious deaths happening there. Now, commune members have courageously decided to tell their stories in hopes of helping others.

programme.title: License to Kill: Death by Injection
programme.desc: When a vivacious college student turns up dead in her home, detectives uncover a deadly, one-sided obsession that leads them on an international chase to catch her killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Knotek
programme.desc: A woman runs a boarding house with a killer eviction policy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Gypsy Grandma

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Man Eater
programme.desc: A wealthy entrepreneur is shot in his home. Suspects are plenty, but with only suspicion to go on, it takes investigators over 7 years to nab his killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Illicit Affairs
programme.desc: Lust and greed are at the core of this case of a wife and mother who is found dead in her pool. Investigators are quick to uncover a web of affairs, lies, and fraud that lead them to her killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Deadly Greed
programme.desc: Three members of a wealthy family are gunned down in their own home. But with little evidence to go on, investigators embark on a multi-year surveillance operation to see if they can prove their instincts are correct.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: A beloved entrepreneur is murdered in his office. A secret double life is quickly revealed, and despite mountains of suspicion, lies and motives, his killer is not who you'd assume.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: High Stakes Homicide

programme.title: Super Factories: Rolls-Royce Super Engine

programme.desc: Paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance crew respond to a woman critically injured in a head-on collision and fear she may be bleeding internally. Also, the team scrambles to locate an injured walker in the massive expanse of a national park.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: Super Factories: Rolls-Royce Super Engine

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Drowning in Tears
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven. But while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon the shadow of Tim's ex-wife. Despite the best intentions, everyone knows that raising a family can be murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love Gone Bankrupt
programme.desc: Gary and Pam Triano's whirlwind romance results in marriage, shady business deals, betrayals and one very bitter custody battle, it leads to a climax that's nothing short of explosive.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love in Flames
programme.desc: Family tragedies send a couple's dream of a perfect life up in flames.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: JonBenet: The Untold Truth
programme.desc: Six-year-old beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey is found murdered in her Boulder, Colorado home in 1996. Investigators try to unravel if she was killed in a kidnapping-gone-wrong, by a home intruder or by one of her own family.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Magnificent Mediterranean Pool
programme.desc: This pool is so extraordinary it takes over a year to build. From a 60-foot pool and a 14-foot spa to a hand-carved Italian marble fountain, the kinds pull out all the stops to give a family a piece of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Splash of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Pirate Treasure Pool
programme.desc: Kelly Caviness and his team build two spectacular pools. The first is a modern, kid-friendly retreat for Mike, Lisa and their two children. The other pool is an epic pirate-themed water park complete with a hidden treasure room and animatronic pirates.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations
programme.desc: Michael digs into an incredible one-of-a-kind creation: a deep-fried burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: In the Pits
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is travelling cross-country celebrating the art of pit cooking. In Michigan, Roger meets up with Andy Shundlich of Epicure Catering, helping cook a classic Italian pig roast in his brick-lined pit.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Masterpiece/ Whelk Attack
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs for The Krusty Krab. Giant sea whelks terrorize the folks of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: Squidward gets annoyed when SpongeBob and Patrick get new slide whistles and play them non-stop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob Meets the Strangler/ Pranks a Lot
programme.desc: SpongeBob turns in the littering Tattletale Strangler; SpongeBob and Patrick invest in a local prank shop's magic 'invisible spray'.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Movie: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: The Smurfs team up with human friends to save Smurfette, who has been kidnapped by Gargamel because she knows a secret spell.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart lands a part-time job as Kid Danger, a superhero sidekick in training.

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: The Thundermans are a typical family, with a house in the suburbs and teenagers fighting over bathroom time, but they just happen to have superpowers.

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: The Thundermans are a typical family, with a house in the suburbs and teenagers fighting over bathroom time, but they just happen to have superpowers.

programme.title: Young Dylan
programme.desc: A family's world is turned upside down when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in with them unannounced.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Invasion of the Ferb Snatchers/ Ain't No Kiddie Ride
programme.desc: After an all night science-fiction movie marathon, Candace is convinced that Ferb is an alien and gathers evidence to prove it. The boys admit that they are doing something for an alien but that Ferb is not one.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb-Busters!/ Not Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: Irving's brother, Albert, claims to be the 'Truth Detector' and Candice enlists friends.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lizard Whisperer/ Robot Rodeo
programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Secret of Success/ The Doof Side of the Moon
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are building an ATV powerful enough to handle extreme terrains and even buildings. Meanwhile, Candace and Stacy go to a leadership retreat where Candace learns the steps needed to achieve her ultimate goal of busting her brothers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Split Personality/ Brain Drain
programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Make Play/ Candace Gets Busted
programme.desc: Candace switches places with a princess who looks just like her, but the ongoing antics of Phineas and Ferb prevent her from enjoying the royal luxuries. Then, Candace inadvertently hosts a giant party while Linda and Lawrence are away on a trip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas' Birthday Clip-O-Rama!
programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster: The Musical!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rollercoaster in their backyard, Candace tries to bust them by getting their mom to return from the grocery store early, and Dr. Doofenshmirtz attempts to pull the Eastern Seaboard to the west using tinfoil and a giant magnet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Skiddley Whiffers/ Tour de Ferb
programme.desc: The boys build a giant version of a childhood game, using Danville as the central location. Candace ends up playing along with them so that she can carry on her title of 'Skiddley Whiffers Queen.' Doofenshmirtz tries to deal with Vanessa growing up.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Escape From Phineas Tower/ The Remains of the Platypus
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are inspired by an antique escape chamber to build a computer-controlled tower that allows them to explore the world of escapement. Craziness is going rampant in Danville, but no one has any idea what is going on.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Agent Doof/ Phineas and Ferb the Temple of Juatchadoon
programme.desc: The boys go to Central America to help Damsel in Distress, after finding an amulet, but Dr. Doofenshmirtz wants to use their amulet to destroy the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: That's the Spirit!/ The Curse of Candace
programme.desc: It's Halloween night and the kids encounter a strange boy and his father who are convinced their house is haunted. Then, Candace is bitten by a bat after watching a popular vampire movie and worries that she is becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's in the House/ Minor Monogram
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb can't find Perry and decide to create the Perrytronic 3000, a mechanical structure that can assume any form.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Delivery of Destiny/ Let's Bounce
programme.desc: Follow Paul the Delivery Man as he journeys through his usual stops.

programme.desc: When Doug needs dental work, he discovers that Carrie used to have a crush on his dentist.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Arthur, Spooner
programme.desc: Carrie is assigned team leader and discovers that being the boss isn't what she expected.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Window Pain
programme.desc: Carrie drives Doug crazy when she becomes obsessed with impressing the new neighbours.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Holy Mackerel
programme.desc: When Carrie prays for a raise and gets one, she and Doug start praying for more things.

programme.title: Movie: Just Go With It
programme.desc: To cover up a lie he told his girlfriend, a plastic surgeon convinces his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death by the Bayou
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a disabled teenager is sentenced to death, but the discovery of hidden eyewitness interviews casts new light on his confession.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia
programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Safer at Home-stead
programme.desc: The Raney family turns cameras on themselves as they shelter in place on their Alaskan homestead. When a moose kill is discovered dangerously close to their cabin, Marty attempts to track the predators.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Cold Hard Lockdown
programme.desc: The intense winter has frozen the water supply on the homestead, forcing Marty to hunt for a new water source. In Hawaii, Matt and his wife Katie self-film a lesson in Cacao harvesting on her family's plantation.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home on the Free Range
programme.desc: The Raneys find a cure for toxic land that's plaguing a Kentucky homestead and convince a Virginia family that their free-range dream is killing their farm. The Raneys also take on an ambitious off-grid power supply project for a Tennessee family.
